category_sources: source_facts.description says interactive parallel SSH client; official GitHub README says hss is an interactive SSH client for multiple servers with parallel execution.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hss; official GitHub repository and README use “hss”.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains quick start, installation, and usage documentation; no separate official docs site found in supplied facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/six-ddc/hss; repo not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README states hss supports interactive input via readline, history, autocompletion, and parallel command execution across servers.
